documents.title: Return Policy for Unopened Items
documents.content: Items that are unopened and in their original packaging can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. The original receipt or order confirmation is required.

documents.title: Return Policy for Opened Items
documents.content: Opened items may be returned within 14 days of purchase for a 50% restocking fee. Items must be in good condition with all original accessories included.

documents.title: Standard Shipping Times
documents.content: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping (2-3 business days) and overnight shipping (1 business day) are also available at checkout.

documents.title: Free Shipping Policy
documents.content: Free standard shipping is available on all orders over $50. Orders under $50 will be charged a flat $5.99 shipping fee.

documents.title: Store Hours - Weekdays
documents.content: Our retail stores are open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM EST.

documents.title: Store Hours - Weekends
documents.content: Our retail stores are open Saturday and Sunday from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST.

documents.title: Accepted Payment Methods
documents.content: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, and Apple Pay. We do not accept cash or personal checks for online orders.
